name: A2X
oneLiner: The bridge between your marketplace payouts and your accounting software.
summary: A2X solves a specific, painful problem: marketplace payouts arrive as lump sums that mix sales, fees, taxes, and refunds. A2X automatically breaks those payouts down and posts them cleanly into QuickBooks or Xero, so your books actually reconcile. For sellers (or their accountants) who care about accurate financials, it removes hours of manual categorization.
pros: Separates sales, fees, taxes & refunds correctly
cons: Does one job — needs accounting software alongside it
Pricing scales steeply with order volume
bestFor: Sellers who use QuickBooks or Xero and want their marketplace numbers to reconcile properly.
verdict: If you take your bookkeeping seriously, A2X is close to essential — it turns messy lump-sum payouts into clean, accurate entries. Tiny sellers can wait; everyone else benefits.
affiliate: Recurring commission via the official partner program.
